name: PAPARAZZI (Original)
description: Original Paparazzi template — the first version. Celebrity street energy, camera flashes, fashion week.

steps.prompt: Original Paparazzi style celebrity photo. A model wearing the clothing product is caught by paparazzi leaving a fashion event. Side-of-the-street setting, photographers with cameras visible in frame periphery, camera flash lighting effect on the subject, the model looks effortlessly stylish and caught mid-stride. This is the classic iconic celebrity paparazzi shot. Slightly candid feel but the clothing is clearly detailed and beautiful. 35mm film photography quality.

Original paparazzi video clip. Celebrity model leaving a venue, photographers surrounding them with cameras flashing, the model walks through confidently, the clothing is shown beautifully in the flash-lit chaos, handheld camera following the subject, classic celebrity street photography motion.
